landing.title: Enter your payment code
landing.subtitle: Open the payment link you were sent, or type its code below.
landing.hint: You'll usually arrive here from a link — no code needed.

secured: Payments are encrypted and processed securely by Qeet Pay.

success.title: Payment successful
success.subtitle: Your payment to {{merchant}} is complete.
success.note: A receipt has been sent by {{merchant}}. You can safely close this page.

PAID.title: Already paid
PAID.body: This payment link has already been paid. There's nothing more to do.

EXPIRED.title: This link has expired
EXPIRED.body: This payment link is no longer valid. Please ask {{merchant}} for a new one.

CANCELLED.title: This link was cancelled
CANCELLED.body: This payment link was cancelled by {{merchant}} and can no longer be used.

notFound.title: Link not found
notFound.subtitle: We couldn't find this payment link.
notFound.body: The link may be mistyped, expired, or removed. Please check the link you were sent and try again.

errors.notCompleted: The payment couldn't be completed. Please try again.
